name: Pistachio Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter in a mixing bowl until smooth.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in egg yolk. Add cream and vanilla, mixing well.
4. Stir in flour until blended.
5. Spoon the mixture into a pastry bag fitted with a large open star tip (3/4-inch diameter).
6. Pipe out cookies onto ungreased baking sheets, spacing them 2 inches apart.
7. Sprinkle with nuts.
8. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
9. Remove cookies to racks to cool completely.
